name: USS PCS-1390 (PCS-1390)
events: 20 Mar 1944 PCS 1390 assigned to Guantanamo Bay, Cuba. (1)
15 Sep 1944 Participated in the Palau Invasion (1)
25 Mar 1945left Ulithi headed for invasion of Okinawa Gunto Ryukyu Islands (1)
1 Apr 1945 Participated in the invasion of Okinawa (1)
6 Apr 1945ship hit by shell fire, 1 dead, 7 injured. (1)

12 Apr 1945 A Val kamikaze missed ship by small margin and hit Charlie Noble on a merchant nearby. Screen begins to limp in with substantial damage to cans. 11 sunk and 16 damaged. One Betty shot down by an F4U at about 6,000 ft, took 4.5 minutes to hit land. Fighters from Okinawa got 45 planes. (1)
